/usr/local/cuda-12.4/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler      -O3     --use_fast_math     -lineinfo     --ptxas-options=-v -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_89,code=[compute_89,sm_89]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/reduction.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/reduction.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/reduction.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
